title: elaeocarpus braceanus
intro: Elaeocarpus braceanus, also known as the Malayan blueberry tree, is a species of plant in the Elaeocarpaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. The leaves and fruits of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Elaeocarpus braceanus has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant's leaves and fruits can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional medicine.
